name: paylod/paylod
description: Official PHP client for the paylod API - M-Pesa (Safaricom Daraja) STK Push, status polling, signed webhooks and offline error decoding, with first-class Laravel support.

scripts-descriptions.phpunit: The test suite on its own.
scripts-descriptions.sync-catalog: Re-copy the canonical Daraja code table out of the paylod monorepo into src/resources/. The vendored copy is GENERATED - never hand-edit it.
scripts-descriptions.catalog-drift: Fail if the vendored Daraja code table has drifted from its canonical source. Skips cleanly when the monorepo is not checked out, since a published-package consumer has nothing to compare against.
scripts-descriptions.non-vacuity: Revert each landed protection in isolation and require its test to FAIL. A test that passes with and without the fix it claims to cover proves nothing.
scripts-descriptions.test: Catalog drift check, PHPUnit, then the non-vacuity mutation harness. The harness is part of `test` on purpose: while it was a separate command, an ordinary test run reported success without ever exercising it. GitHub Actions runs this chain on every push and pull request.
